record.field: Hello! Welcome to our store. How can we help you today? 😊
Thank you for your order! Your order number is {order_number}. We'll keep you updated on the status. 📦
Hi! This is a friendly reminder that your invoice {invoice_number} is due. Please let us know if you have any questions. 💰
Hi! We're here to help. Please describe your issue and we'll get back to you as soon as possible. 🛠️
🎉 Special offer just for you! Get 20% off on your next purchase. Use code: SPECIAL20
